title: NoContext
description:
NoContext is a Mod With No Context what so ever.
Aka. Me Learning Java and Sharing it with the World.
body:
# **NoContext is Needed!**
### Its recommended to install this mod before starting a world!
## What is NoContext 🔍:
NoContext is a mod I use to Test/Learn modding!

NoContext is a work in progress, so don’t be surprised if an item gets removed or starts behaving differently!

NoContext aims to improve the longevity of single-player games and make them more fun in the process!

## Features📚:
- Oxidizing Copper: Copper now Oxidizes over time!
- Waxable Copper Ingots!: To make copper ingots not Oxidize over time!
- Crafttable oxidized copper blocks!: You can Craft Oxidized Copper Blocks with the new ingots!

## Future Features💾:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Changed vanilla recepiece
- Changed Behavior of certain items
- And More!

</details>
